calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-12-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Diana Redding appearing via zoom for Juan Francisco Jimenez (petitioner).

Mrs. Redding stated that she has been in contact with the family via email and that they have no objections. The Court noted that it will waive defective notice. Report of administrator and petition for compensation to attorney and petition for final distribution on account is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-19-2023 Continued To Jun-05-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-01-2023 Continued To Apr-24-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-09-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Diana Redding, via ZOOM, for Juan F. Jimenez, Petitioner.

The court thanks Ms. Redding for her efforts in attempting to clarify the markings on the will. The court advises that it is questioning whether to appoint Mr. Jimenez with full or limited IAEA authority. Ms. Redding advises that her client has asked to be appointed with full IAEA authority because of the real property. The court voices its concern in doing so because he resides out-of-state. The court queries counsel regarding creditors. Ms. Redding advises that to her knowledge, there are no existing creditors. After additional discussion, the court advises Ms. Redding that it is satisfied with her advocacy and asks if anyone is appearing to object. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jun-10-1996 is admitted to probate. Juan Francisco Jimenez is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jan-09-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two-weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: D. Xiao. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-06-2021 Continued To Dec-22-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-18-2021 Continued To Dec-06-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Diana Redding, via ZOOM, for Juan Francisco Jimenez, Petitioner.

The court begins by confirming with counsel that the decedent passed-away in San Francisco and accordingly, there is no issue with venue. The court then points counsel to the issue with the markings on the top of the will. Counsel reports that she did not see the original will as the document had been delivered directly to the court with the petition. The court notes its concerns regarding the markings and asks counsel to file additional information regarding the markings on the will. Counsel advises that she had reached-out to her client for clarification about the markings on the will and had hoped to hear back from him by today but received no response.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Probate of Will and Letters Testamentary is continued to Dec-06-2021at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.
